# nomad_node_pools (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nomad_node_pools" "prod" {
  filter = "Meta.env == \"prod\""
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `filter` (String) Specifies the expression used to filter the results.
- `prefix` (String) Specifies a string to filter node pools based on a name prefix.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `node_pools` (List of Object) List of node pools returned (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--node_pools))

<a id="nestedatt--node_pools"></a>
### Nested Schema for `node_pools`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String)
- `meta` (Map of String)
- `name` (String)
- `node_identity_ttl` (String)
- `scheduler_config` (Set of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--node_pools--scheduler_config))

<a id="nestedobjatt--node_pools--scheduler_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `node_pools.scheduler_config`

Read-Only:

- `memory_oversubscription` (String)
- `scheduler_algorithm` (String)
